archimate:Representation.name: LDES
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: A Linked Data Event Stream (LDES) is a new data publishing approach which allows you to publish any dataset as a collection of immutable objects. The focus of an LDES is to allow clients to replicate the history of a dataset and efficiently synchronise with its latest changes.
Publisher: SEMIC (European Commission)
Source: https://semiceu.github.io/LinkedDataEventStreams/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/LDESRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/LDESRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: A Linked Data Event Stream (LDES) is a new data publishing approach which allows you to publish any dataset as a collection of immutable objects. The focus of an LDES is to allow clients to replicate the history of a dataset and efficiently synchronise with its latest changes.
